final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu cover image for a pearl milk tea product, styled in pink girly aesthetic with a summer refreshing feel.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu grass-planting cover photo, soft pink girly aesthetic, pastel editorial
Composition: centered product hero shot, slight overhead or eye-level angle, clean negative space for text overlay
Subject: pearl milk tea drink with visible tapioca pearls, condensation on cup surface
Scene/backdrop: light airy summer backdrop, soft pink or white surface with scattered pastel props
Lighting/mood: bright, soft diffused light, breezy and refreshing summer mood
Color palette: pastel pink, creamy white, soft peach accents — no dark or moody tones
Materials/textures: dewy condensation on cup, smooth plastic or glass cup, glossy pearls visible through cup
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: vertical 3:4 format suited for Xiaohongshu cover, product must be clearly legible and appetizing
Avoid: dark backgrounds, heavy shadows, overly busy props, Western coffee-shop aesthetic
